# Test Guide

This is a test guide document for testing the DocumentManager functionality.

## Introduction

This document contains sample content for testing purposes.

## Features

- Document categorization
- Search functionality
- Content retrieval
- Metadata extraction

## Usage

Use this guide to understand how the documentation system works.

## Testing

This content is used by the automated test suite to verify:

1. Document loading from embedded filesystem
2. Search functionality across content
3. Categorization and metadata extraction
4. Error handling for edge cases

## Conclusion

This is the end of the test guide document.
